questionHtml: One of the two postulates of special relativity states that the speed of light in a vacuum is the same for all observers in inertial reference frames. State the other postulate of special relativity.
markschemeHtml:
laws of physics are the same for all observers
OR
laws of physics are the same in all «inertial» frames ✔

NOTE: OWTTE
